examples: The sleigh was on one runner, heeling like a yacht in a wind.
An example of an advanced body signal is seen during heeling.
Heeling brush is also excellent for removing ugly lines under the eyes.
Aboard Outrageous, heeling in the wind, we figured that we'd put the worst behind us.
He survived an excellent back-heeling attack from Andrew Carlile before twisting to win, and when there had to be a wrestle-off for third and fourth place, he repeated his feat.
